TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Borut_Pahor, title = Borut_Pahor, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Borut_Pahor} }

S.FORM: == Borut Pahor == ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 11, Borut Pahor, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Slovenia ta' misuw hya' ga Borut Pahor, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. aring raran qutux sen qeru kbhul mspat pgan cyugan kawas(1983) qutux sen qeru kbhul mspat pqan pitu kawas(1987) qutux sen qeru kbhul mspat pgan kawas(1980) s'agan mrhuw na qyanux qutux qeru qeru tnsyan kawas payat byacing. qnxan nya Borut Pahor htagan beh sa Borut Postojna. kawas tay 1983,tmasoq gocyu pqwasan biru maki Nova Gorica. nha qutux rangi' kneril nya,cyux qmayah qutux laqi mlikuy. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Borut Pahor == ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 11, Borut Pahor, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Slovenia ta' misuw hya' ga Borut Pahor, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. aring raran qutux sen qeru kbhul mspat pgan cyugan kawas(1983) qutux sen qeru kbhul mspat pqan pitu kawas(1987) qutux sen qeru kbhul mspat pgan kawas(1980) s'agan mrhuw na qyanux qutux qeru qeru tnsyan kawas payat byacing. qnxan nya Borut Pahor htagan beh sa Borut Postojna. kawas tay 1983,tmasoq gocyu pqwasan biru maki Nova Gorica. nha qutux rangi' kneril nya,cyux qmayah qutux laqi mlikuy. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == βorut paħor == rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, βorut paħor, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw s~ɕlo*enia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa βorut paħor, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ariŋ raran qutux s~ɕen qeru kβħul ms~ɕpat pɣan ʦ~ʨjuɣan kawas~ɕ(****) qutux s~ɕen qeru kβħul ms~ɕpat pqan pitu kawas~ɕ(****) qutux s~ɕen qeru kβħul ms~ɕpat pɣan kawas~ɕ(****) s~ɕʔaɣan mrħuw na qjanux qutux qeru qeru tns~ɕjan kawas~ɕ pajat βjaʦ~ʨiŋ. qnxan nja βorut paħor ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa βorut pos~ɕtojna. kawas~ɕ taj ****,tmas~ɕoq ɣoʦ~ʨju pqwas~ɕan βiru maki no*a ɣoriʦ~ʨa. nħa qutux raŋiʔ kneril nja,ʦ~ʨjux qmajaħ qutux laqi mlikuj. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
